race_meta.race_name: Best Odds Guaranteed Overnight At CopyBet Novices' Handicap Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed benmore at position 2 (24.0% probability) vs top pick Celestial Fashion (46.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~22.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Celestial Fashion > Benmore, but actual result was Benmore > Kahavari. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Benmore had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -3.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
